mnemonics: TREND: Track Regularly, Estimate Needs, Determine capacity
keyPoints: Analyze historical data to identify patterns and cycles
Use statistical models (e.g., linear regression, time series analysis) to forecast future demand
Consider business growth plans and upcoming projects that will impact IT resource requirements
commonMistakes: Focusing only on current usage without extrapolating for future growth
Ignoring seasonal variations or one-time events that skew the data
Failing to build in a buffer for unexpected demand or estimation errors
